rashi._hint: Zodiac sign names. Use the standard astronomical/astrological term in target language (e.g. Aries→白羊座 in Chinese, Bélier in French).

planet._hint: Planet names. Use the standard astronomical term in target language (Sun→太阳 in Chinese, Soleil in French). Rahu and Ketu are Vedic-only — transliterate them in the target script.

day._hint: Days of the week. Use standard calendar names (Monday→星期一 in Chinese, lundi in French).

direction._hint: Cardinal/intercardinal directions. Use standard direction word (North→北 in Chinese, Nord in French).

color._hint: Color names. Use natural color word (Red→红 in Chinese, Rouge in French).

metal._hint: Metal names (Copper→铜 in Chinese, Cuivre in French).

element._hint: Five classical elements. Use natural element word (Fire→火 in Chinese, Feu in French). Ether/Akasha → use the closest 'sky/space/aether' term.

gemstone._hint: Gemstone names. Use standard gem name in target language (Ruby→红宝石 in Chinese, Rubis in French).

deity._hint: Hindu deity names — sacred names. TRANSLITERATE phonetically into the target script (do NOT translate meaning). Examples: Hanuman → 哈奴曼 (Chinese), هانومان (Arabic), ハヌマーン (Japanese). Keep them recognizable.

nakshatra._hint: 27 Vedic lunar mansions — Sanskrit-only proper nouns. TRANSLITERATE phonetically into the target script. Examples: Ashwini → 阿湿毗你 (Chinese), أشويني (Arabic), アシュヴィニー (Japanese). Do NOT invent translations.
